message:
feat(bench): add wa_agent_streaming benchmark for distributed streaming performance

Add Criterion benchmark suite for wa-agent distributed streaming with
four benchmark families:
- bench_agent_capture_cpu: CPU capture throughput
- bench_agent_capture_memory: memory capture allocation patterns
- bench_agent_delta_serialization: delta compression serialization
- bench_agent_network_send: network send path latency

Wire [[bench]] entry in Cargo.toml (requires "distributed" feature).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -220,6 +220,11 @@ name = "mux_client_ops"
 harness = false
 required-features = ["vendored"]
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "wa_agent_streaming"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["distributed"]
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "shard_routing"
 harness = false
